title: lastrea scabra
intro: Lastrea scabra, also known as the scabrous lady fern, is a species of fern native to tropical Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lastrea scabra include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and acting as an antidote for poison. It can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, by drying and processing its leaves.
